title: Urban Terrors
description: Survive the world full of prehistoric terrors, hunting you down at every moment
body:
WARNING- this mod requires Geckolib to work


Welcome to the Shadow of extinction, a minecraft mod adding several species of dinosaurus that will hunt you down when you least expect it
First launch adds mobs as:
- Troodon (heavily inspired by Weird Birds made by Archesuchus)
- Utahraptor (Inspired both by Primitive War and Weird Birds Part 2)

Expect more soon.....

Models + Patterns + Coding by A0RPG (me)
Textures by Duoud
Animations by Deemo
Utahraptor sounds by Big fulla
